tenders.english_summary: The North Savo Wellbeing Services County is requesting tenders for capsule endoscopy equipment for the endoscopy unit at Kuopio University Hospital. The procurement includes endoscopic capsule cameras for small intestine examination, associated devices, accessories, software, and consumables for approximately 180 examinations per year. Trial use of compliant equipment will be conducted after tender submission.
tenders.what_they_want: Capsule endoscopy equipment system including endoscopic capsule cameras for small intestine examination, required associated devices for usage rights during contract period, device-specific consumables, accessories, and software. Equipment must be capable of handling approximately 180 examinations per year.
tenders.eligibility_requirements: Suppliers must meet minimum requirements for capsule endoscopy devices. Equipment meeting minimum requirements will undergo trial use consisting of five (5) capsule endoscopy examinations. Supplier must deliver equipment for trial within twenty-one (21) days of buyer's request and arrange trial use with the ordering unit within two (2) months of tender submission date.
tenders.evaluation_criteria: Total points comprised of price weighted at 40 points and quality weighted at 60 points. One (1) supplier will be selected.

tenders.original_title: Estonia – Disposable non-chemical medical consumables and haematological consumables
tenders.english_summary: This is a procurement tender issued by Tartu University Hospital (Estonia) for disposable non-chemical medical consumables and haematological consumables. The detailed specifications, exclusion grounds, and qualification requirements are referenced in Appendix 1 of the tender documents.
tenders.what_they_want: Disposable non-chemical medical consumables and haematological consumables (specific items, models, and brands are referenced in Appendix 1 of tender documents but not provided in this notice)
tenders.eligibility_requirements: NOT FOUND (referenced in tender base documents Appendix 1 but not detailed in this notice)
tenders.evaluation_criteria: NOT FOUND (referenced in tender base documents but not detailed in this notice)

tenders.english_summary: Keski-Pohjanmaan hyvinvointialue Soite is requesting tenders for mechanical lower limb prostheses for the period 1.1.2026 - 31.12.2027 with options for 1+1 additional years. The procurement covers prosthetic devices and services for customers who require lower limb prostheses due to congenital abnormalities, accidents, or amputations.
tenders.what_they_want: Mechanical lower limb prostheses including: leg/shank prostheses (activity levels 2-5) and thigh prostheses (activity levels 2-5). Services include needs assessment, design, manufacturing, fitting, usage instructions, suitability evaluation, and necessary adjustments within a 4-month suitability guarantee period. The supplier must also commit to repairing prostheses from other suppliers in the region.
tenders.evaluation_criteria: Two service providers will be selected through a framework agreement, with priority ranking based on points scored. The buyer may deviate from the priority order if customer needs and previous implementations require it.

tenders.english_summary: The Klinikum Saarbrücken hospital in Germany intends to rent a mobile angiography container solution for a four-month period starting late May 2026 to maintain patient care during renovation and installation of a new angiography system. Following market research, they plan to conduct a negotiated procedure without competition exclusively with Marienhaus Dienstleistungen GmbH, as their container is reportedly the only available solution meeting technical requirements within the required timeframe.
tenders.what_they_want: Mobile angiography container solution equipped with ARTIS One angiography system from Siemens Healthineers AG, capable of performing interventional, radiological, neuroradiological and cardiological procedures including emergency care spectrum, for a four-month rental period beginning end of May 2026.
tenders.eligibility_requirements: This is a negotiated procedure without competition restricted exclusively to Marienhaus Dienstleistungen GmbH under §14 Abs. 4 Nr. 2 lit. b VGV, based on claimed sole availability of compatible equipment within the required timeframe.

tenders.english_summary: This is a tender for medical consumables issued by Tartu University Hospital (Sihtasutus Tartu Ülikooli Kliinikum) in Estonia. The detailed technical specifications are referenced in Appendix 1 of the tender documents, along with exclusion grounds and qualification requirements.
tenders.what_they_want: Medical consumables (specific items and specifications are referenced in Appendix 1 of the tender documents, which is not included in this notice)
tenders.eligibility_requirements: Exclusion grounds and qualification conditions are specified in the tender base documents (referenced but not detailed in this notice)

tenders.buyer_name: Wielospecjalistyczny Szpital - Samodzielny Publiczny Zespół Opieki Zdrowotnej w Zgorzelcu
tenders.english_summary: This is a tender for the expansion and construction of a Long-Term Care Facility for chronically ill patients in Zgorzelec, Poland, using a "design and build" contract formula. The project includes infrastructure development, equipment procurement, and roof renovation of an existing building, funded through Poland's National Recovery and Resilience Plan Component D for healthcare system efficiency.
tenders.what_they_want: Design and construction of infrastructure for a Long-Term Care Facility (Zakład Opiekuńczo-Leczniczy) including equipment and medical devices for chronically ill patients requiring life-sustaining services. Specific equipment details are referenced in Attachment 7.1 to the procurement specification.
tenders.eligibility_requirements: Contractors must employ workers directly (on employment contracts in accordance with Labor Code) for demolition works, general construction works, electrical and technical installations, and sanitary networks/installations, paying at least minimum wage throughout the contract period. This requirement applies to subcontractors as well.

tenders.buyer_name: Wojewódzki Szpital Specjalistyczny im. Stefana Kardynała Wyszyńskiego Samodzielny Publiczny Zakład Opieki Zdrowotnej
tenders.english_summary: This is a tender for the procurement of various chemotherapy pharmaceutical products by a specialized provincial hospital in Poland. The tender covers multiple oncology drugs including Abiraterone, Cabazitaxel, Fluorouracil, Paclitaxel, and various other chemotherapy medications in specific dosages and packaging configurations.
tenders.what_they_want: Chemotherapy pharmaceutical products including: Abiraterone acetate 500mg tablets; Cabazitaxel concentrate for infusion 10mg/ml (4.5ml, 5ml, 6ml vials); Fluorouracil solution for injection 50mg/ml (20ml and 100ml vials); Paclitaxel concentrate 300mg/50ml; Gemcitabine concentrate 1g and 2g; Etoposide concentrate 100mg/5ml; Ondansetron injection 8mg/4ml and 4mg/2ml; Filgrastim injection 30 million units/0.5ml and 48 million units/0.5ml; Vincristine solution 1mg/ml; Darbepoetin alfa 0.5mg/1ml; Sunitinib 12.5mg, 25mg, and 50mg capsules; Panitumumab concentrate 20mg/ml (5ml and 20ml vials); Fulvestrant solution 250mg/5ml; Pazopanib 200mg and 400mg tablets; Carboplatin concentrate 0.150g/15ml, 0.450g/45ml, 0.6g/60ml; Cisplatin concentrate 50mg and 100mg.
tenders.eligibility_requirements: Products must be from the chemotherapy catalog. Multiple items require packaging from a single manufacturer. Specific stability requirements apply: Fluorouracil must have chemical and physical stability of minimum 72 hours after first opening confirmed in ChPL; Paclitaxel requires minimum 28 days vial stability after first opening; Gemcitabine requires minimum 14 days stability after first opening; Carboplatin requires minimum 14 days chemical and physical stability after first opening; Cisplatin requires minimum 14 days stability after first opening.

tenders.english_summary: Jan Yperman Hospital in Belgium is procuring 20 new mobile motorized operating tables for their surgical quarter. The contract includes purchase, delivery, installation, commissioning, maintenance, and necessary training, with all accessories interchangeable across all tables.
tenders.what_they_want: 20 mobile motorized operating tables with minimum 30° Trendelenburg capability (at least 5 tables must support minimum 45° Trendelenburg). All accessories must be interchangeable across all tables. Includes delivery, installation, commissioning, maintenance contract, and training. Option to purchase additional replacement accessories during the lifecycle.
tenders.eligibility_requirements: Must be a single bidder capable of supplying all 20 mobile motorized operating tables with the specified requirements.

tenders.original_title: Estonia – Disposable non-chemical medical consumables and haematological consumables
tenders.english_summary: This is a tender for a framework agreement to purchase hemodialysis dialyzers and related training services for Tartu University Hospital in Estonia. The contract will run until October 31, 2028, and includes mandatory user training in Estonian language to be conducted at the hospital premises.
tenders.what_they_want: Hemodialysis dialyzers (disposable non-chemical medical consumables and haematological consumables). Product descriptions are provided in Annex 1. Training on the use of each offered product in Estonian language at the hospital location (L. Puusepa 8, Tartu).
tenders.eligibility_requirements: Qualification requirements and exclusion grounds are set out in the procurement documentation "Instructions to Tenderers" (specific requirements not detailed in this notice excerpt).

tenders.original_title: Sweden – Dental and subspecialty instruments and devices
tenders.english_summary: Region Gotland is conducting a market consultation prior to a procurement for dental treatment units and X-ray equipment for dental care. They are seeking input from suppliers on dental units, treatment chairs, X-ray equipment, intraoral sensors, instrument cleaning systems, and related service offerings.
tenders.what_they_want: Dental treatment units (dental unitar), patient treatment chairs (behandlingsstolar), X-ray equipment for dental clinics (röntgenutrustning), intraoral digital sensors (intraorala digitala sensorer), instrument cleaning systems (instrumentrengöringssystem), and service/maintenance for equipment from own or other suppliers
tenders.eligibility_requirements: Suppliers who market one or more solutions within the listed product categories are welcome to register. No specific certifications, experience requirements, or company size requirements mentioned.

tenders.english_summary: This tender is for an implantable electrical stimulation system for the lower back muscles to stabilize the lumbar spine. The system includes implantable electrodes, a stimulator/pulse generator to be fitted into the pelvic bone, and external programming equipment with patient training.
tenders.what_they_want: Electrical stimulation system for lumbar spine stabilization consisting of: implantable electrodes for lower back muscle stimulation, pulse generator/stimulator unit (to be implanted in pelvic bone, left or right side), external programming device for adjustment, patient-oriented handheld control device. System must include intraoperative programming support and patient training on device operation.
tenders.eligibility_requirements: Bidders must provide certificates and documentation for the procedure, proof of material compatibility for electrodes and stimulator, and MRI compatibility certification. Bidders must present their postoperative support concept during the procedure.

tenders.original_title: Germany – Medical equipments, pharmaceuticals and personal care products
tenders.english_summary: This is a market exploration for a robotic-assisted surgical system to support hip and knee endoprosthesis implantations. The buyer seeks to assess available robotic surgery systems compatible with specific implant series currently used, their pricing, delivery times, and technical specifications. This is explicitly stated as market research, not a binding procurement, and public procurement rules do not apply.
tenders.what_they_want: Robotic-assisted surgical system for hip and knee endoprosthesis implantations, compatible with specific implant series including EXETER V40, MAKO/MCK FEMORAL, MAKO/MCK TIBIAL, TRIATHLON CR/PS FEM series, TRITANIUM BPLATE, TRIDENTII TRITANIUM, RESTORATION ADM, and others listed. System must support three applications (hip, knee, and patella). Must include CT-based pre-operative planning with product specialist support, delivery, installation, acceptance testing, operational handover, and maintenance services.
tenders.evaluation_criteria: Mandatory "must criteria" include: compatibility with specified implant series and German regulatory approval; capability for three applications (hip, knee, patella); CT-based pre-operative planning included; delivery, installation, acceptance, operational handover and maintenance services. Alternative solutions may be proposed if mandatory criteria not met, but changing the implant series is not acceptable.

tenders.original_title: Estonia – Operating theatre devices and instruments
tenders.english_summary: This is a tender for the procurement of high-speed drills and shavers used in ENT (ear, nose, throat) and neurosurgery operating theaters by North Estonia Regional Hospital. The procurement is divided into separate lots for ENT shavers/drills and neurosurgery high-speed drills.
tenders.what_they_want: High-speed surgical drills for neurosurgery and ENT shavers/high-speed drills for ENT (ear, nose, throat) surgery applications.
tenders.eligibility_requirements: Exclusion grounds and qualification conditions are referenced in the tender base documents (specific requirements not detailed in this notice excerpt).

tenders.buyer_name: УНИВЕРСИТЕТСКА МНОГОПРОФИЛНА БОЛНИЦА ЗА АКТИВНО ЛЕЧЕНИЕ "АЛЕКСАНДРОВСКА" ЕАД
tenders.english_summary: This tender is for the supply of 4 Gallium-68 generators (Ge-68/Ga-68) over a 24-month period for a university hospital in Bulgaria. The procurement includes two types of generators with different specifications, along with sterile hydrochloric acid (HCl) vials for elution, with delivery required within 70 calendar days.
tenders.what_they_want: Four (4) Gallium-68 generators total over 24 months: Type 1 - One (1) Ge-68/Ga-68 Gallium generator compatible with ITM IQS-TS synthesis module (Germany) with activity 50mCi/1850 MBq, including transport, installation and replacement of connecting lines; 250 sterile single-use vials of 0.05M HCl saline acid (4ml volume) for GMP elution compatible with ITM Ge-68/Ga-68; Type 2 - Three (3) Gallium generators complying with cGMP, parent nuclide Ge68, daughter nuclide Ga68, activity ≥50mCi, elution volume ≤5ml, molarity ≤0.1M HCl, endotoxin limit ≤175 EU/ml, minimum 250 elutions or 10 months shelf life (whichever comes first), supplied with sufficient HCl for 250 elutions.
tenders.eligibility_requirements: Bidder must be authorized by the medical device manufacturer or their authorized representative to sell the respective product in the territory of Bulgaria. Must provide catalogs, brochures, information sheets or equivalent with detailed information translated into Bulgarian demonstrating all indicators and manufacturing characteristics proving quality and compliance with technical specifications. Medical devices must have shelf life of minimum 12 months from delivery acceptance date.

tenders.original_title: Estonia – Operating theatre devices and instruments
tenders.english_summary: This tender is for the procurement of a robotic surgery system for North Estonia Regional Hospital. The system must be universal and suitable for use in general surgery, urology, gynecology, thoracic surgery, and head and neck surgery, and must include an operating table, instruments, and training.
tenders.what_they_want: Universal robotic surgery system with operating table, surgical instruments, and training. System must be compatible with general surgery, urology, gynecology, thoracic surgery, and head and neck surgery procedures.
tenders.eligibility_requirements: Exclusion grounds and qualification conditions are specified in the tender base documents (not detailed in this notice).

tenders.english_summary: This is a tender for nutritional therapy preparations, feeding devices and accessories for home-based nutritional therapy patients. The procurement includes various enteral and oral nutritional preparations for different medical conditions, gastrostomy extensions, protein/fiber supplements, and thickening agents for patients with swallowing difficulties.
tenders.what_they_want: Nutritional therapy preparations and feeding equipment including: gastrostomy button extensions; complete enteral nutrition preparations (energy-rich with fiber, for increased energy needs with fluid restriction, vitamin/mineral enriched, vegan-suitable, for diabetes/hyperglycemia, high protein, for digestive/absorption disorders); oral nutrition preparations (energy and protein rich with/without fiber, with high EPA+DHA for perioperative nutrition, modular ketogenic diet preparations, with reduced minerals for dialysis patients, with branched-chain amino acids for liver disease/celiac patients); protein powder supplements; fiber powder supplements; thickening agents for patients with swallowing disorders.
tenders.eligibility_requirements: NOT FOUND (document states "Vaata hanke alusdokumentidest" - see procurement base documents - for exclusion grounds and qualification conditions)

tenders.original_title: Poland – Disposable non-chemical medical consumables and haematological consumables
tenders.buyer_name: Wojewódzki Szpital Specjalistyczny im. Stefana Kardynała Wyszyńskiego Samodzielny Publiczny Zakład Opieki Zdrowotnej
tenders.english_summary: This tender is for the supply of disposable medical consumables to a specialist hospital in Poland. The procurement covers multiple categories including patient washing gloves and caps, disposable resuscitators for adults/children/infants, ureteral splinting sets, and various catheters, probes, baskets and ureteral pushers.
tenders.what_they_want: Patient washing gloves and head washing caps (2 product positions); Disposable resuscitators for adults, children and infants (3 product positions); Ureteral splinting sets (7 product positions); Catheters, probes, baskets, and ureteral pushers (12 product positions). All items must be CE marked medical devices.
tenders.eligibility_requirements: Suppliers must provide products authorized for sale and use in Poland in accordance with applicable law. Products must have CE marking and documents confirming conformity assessment procedures according to the Medical Devices Act of April 7, 2022. Bidders must submit product documentation (product cards, catalogs, instructions, leaflets) from manufacturer or authorized representative showing composition, characteristics, intended use, and parameters.

tenders.english_summary: The Faculty Hospital in Motol, Czech Republic, is procuring a steam sterilizer (autoclave) for the Institute of Medical Microbiology. The scope includes delivery, installation, commissioning, staff training, and both warranty and post-warranty service.
tenders.what_they_want: One new, unused steam sterilizer (autoclave) with all accessories and components included. Must meet technical specifications in Annex 1 of the purchase contract. Delivery includes installation, commissioning, functionality verification, all prescribed tests, staff training/instruction, warranty service, and post-warranty service.
tenders.eligibility_requirements: Service personnel must be authorized according to § 41 of Act No. 375/2022 Coll. on Medical Devices. Service technicians must be certified by manufacturer and authorized according to § 44–46 of Act No. 375/2022 Coll. on Medical Devices.

tenders.english_summary: This is a tender for the supply and installation of a steam sterilizer (autoclave) for the Institute of Medical Microbiology at the 2nd Faculty of Medicine, Charles University and Motol University Hospital in the Czech Republic. The procurement includes delivery, installation, commissioning, staff training, and warranty/post-warranty service.
tenders.what_they_want: One steam sterilizer (autoclave) for medical microbiology use. Must be new, unused, delivered with all accessories and no additional components needed. Includes installation, commissioning with all prescribed tests, staff training/instruction, warranty and post-warranty service.
tenders.eligibility_requirements: Service personnel must be authorized according to § 41 of Act No. 375/2022 Sb. (Act on Medical Devices). Service technicians must hold manufacturer certification for training per § 44-46 of Act No. 375/2022 Sb.

tenders.buyer_name: COPERNICUS PODMIOT LECZNICZY SPÓŁKA Z OGRANICZONĄ ODPOWIEDZIALNOŚCIĄ
tenders.english_summary: This tender is for design and construction work at St. Wojciech Hospital in Gdańsk, Poland, including renovation of Building K rooms to improve cardiology care accessibility and quality. The project includes delivery of an angiography system and preparation of rooms for magnetic resonance equipment installation, following a "design and build" formula.
tenders.what_they_want: Angiography system (angiograf) - must be factory new, complete, high standard quality and functionality, free from material and construction defects, with 36-month warranty. Preparation of rooms for magnetic resonance (MRI) equipment installation. Construction and installation works for renovation of hospital rooms and infrastructure on level 0 of Buildings K and A.
tenders.evaluation_criteria: Warranty period for construction and installation works is one of the evaluation criteria (minimum 36 months, maximum 60 months from final acceptance date).

tenders.original_title: Slovakia – Medical laser other than for surgery
tenders.buyer_name: Fakultná nemocnica s poliklinikou F. D. Roosevelta Banská Bystrica
tenders.english_summary: This is a tender for the procurement of an ophthalmological laser with slit lamp and accessories including related services for the 2nd Eye Clinic at F.D. Roosevelt University Hospital in Banská Bystrica. The equipment must be new, unused, meet EU standards, and include delivery, installation, training, and minimum 24 months authorized service support.
tenders.what_they_want: Ophthalmological laser with slit lamp and accessories for ophthalmic use (non-surgical medical laser). Equipment must be new, unused, not refurbished, approved for import and sale in Slovakia/EU, compliant with international standards and STN norms, and have valid ŠUKL code. Services include delivery to specified location, installation, functional testing, protocol handover, documentation, staff training, and full authorized service support for minimum 24 months including mandatory preventive inspections.
tenders.eligibility_requirements: Bidders must provide equipment approved for import and sale in Slovak Republic/European Union, complying with valid international standards, STN standards, and general binding legal regulations with assigned valid ŠUKL code. All offered services must comply with relevant EU legal requirements. Burden of proof for product identification and compliance with functional characteristics is on the bidder.

tenders.original_title: Finland – Medical equipments, pharmaceuticals and personal care products
tenders.english_summary: This is a tender from the North Ostrobothnia Wellbeing Services County in Finland for the procurement of various biopsy needles and mammography marking devices. The tender is divided into three lots covering different types of biopsy needles (thin, thick automatic, semi-automatic, coaxial, bone marrow) and mammography equipment (skin markers, marking wires, clips for various imaging modalities).
tenders.what_they_want: Lot 1: Thin biopsy needles, automatic thick biopsy needles (general, urology, fullcore), semi-automatic thick biopsy needles, programmable biopsy needles, thick biopsy needles for handles, coaxial biopsy needles. Lot 2: Bone marrow biopsy needles with T-handle (specimen and aspiration), adjustable bone marrow aspiration needles, coaxial bone biopsy needles, bone biopsy needle sets, sclerotic bone biopsy needle sets. Lot 3: Mammography skin markers, mammography marking wires, ductography needles, mammography clips for tomography/stereo/contrast mammography, mammography clips for ultrasound guidance, mammography clips for magnetic guidance.
tenders.evaluation_criteria: Selection based on price ranking with quality considered as mandatory requirements. For each product category, 2-3 products will be selected in priority order. The highest-ranked product will be ordered primarily, with medical justification required for ordering lower-ranked products. Selection is product-specific, allowing suppliers to offer multiple products from their range.

tenders.english_summary: This tender is for a framework agreement for communication aids including accessories, spare parts and services. The procurement covers various types of communication devices ranging from simple speech devices with buttons to advanced devices with touchscreens and eye-tracking control, as well as voice amplifiers and software for creating printed picture-based support materials.
tenders.what_they_want: Communication aids across 7 categories: A - Speech device with one or more buttons and recorded speech; B - Speech device with physical keyboard and synthetic speech; C - Speech device with touchscreen; D - Advanced speech device with touchscreen; E - Advanced speech device with touchscreen and eye-tracking control; F - Voice amplifiers; G - Software/service for creating printed picture-based support materials. Includes accessories, spare parts, documentation, and training for handling and technical aspects.
tenders.evaluation_criteria: Suppliers must meet qualification requirements and mandatory requirements for each category. The region intends to award contracts to all suppliers who meet these requirements within each respective category.

tenders.buyer_name: Fakultná nemocnica s poliklinikou F. D. Roosevelta Banská Bystrica
tenders.english_summary: This tender is for the procurement of a 4K/ICG laparoscopic system including related services for the 2nd Surgical Clinic of the University Hospital with Polyclinic F. D. Roosevelt in Banská Bystrica, Slovakia. The equipment must be new, unused, and meet specified technical-medical and functional parameters with full installation, training, and minimum 24-month authorized service support.
tenders.what_they_want: 4K/ICG laparoscopic system (laparoscopic assembly) that is new, unused, not refurbished, with minimum technical-medical and functional parameters as specified. The equipment must be approved for import and sale in Slovakia/EU, comply with international standards and STN, have valid ŠUKL code. Includes delivery, installation, functional testing, documentation, operator training, and full authorized service support for minimum 24 months including mandatory preventive inspections and technical controls.
tenders.eligibility_requirements: Bidders must provide equipment approved for import and sale in Slovakia/European Union, complying with valid international standards, STN (Slovak Technical Standards), and generally binding legal regulations. Equipment must have assigned valid ŠUKL code (Slovak medical device registration). Bidders offering equivalents must prove the product meets utility, operational, and functional characteristics required for the intended purpose.

tenders.buyer_name: The Common Services Agency (more commonly known as NHS National Services Scotland) (NSS)
tenders.english_summary: NHS National Services Scotland is procuring a range of central venous catheters and related vascular access devices including coated and non-coated CVCs, PICC lines, arterial lines, dialysis catheters, and associated accessories. The framework covers 17 lots including both adult and paediatric products, with specific lots for innovation and accessories.
tenders.what_they_want: Coated Central Venous Catheters (CVC), Non-Coated Central Venous Catheters, Paediatric Central Venous Catheters, Midline Catheters, Skin Tunnelling Catheters, PICC Lines (Antimicrobial), PICC Lines (Non-Coated), Seldinger arterial lines, Non-Seldinger Arterial Cannulas, IV Flush Saline Pre-filled Syringes, Stabilisation Devices, Dialysis Central Venous Catheters, Implantable Ports, Central Venous Catheter Insertion Packs, and related accessories and innovation products.
tenders.evaluation_criteria: Framework includes 14 scored lots (Lots 1-14) and unscored lots for accessories, innovation, and additional products. Suppliers must meet all mandatory requirements and tender against scored lots to be awarded framework positions. Access to unscored accessory lots requires successful award to at least one scored lot.

tenders.english_summary: This is a market survey for a planned procurement of anaesthesia devices for Helse Førde Health Trust in Norway. The contracting authority is seeking to map the market, understand price levels, and gather input from potential suppliers before launching the formal procurement (reference 2025/44585).
tenders.what_they_want: Anaesthesia devices (anaesthesia apparatuses) for Helse Førde Health Trust. No specific models or brands mentioned.
tenders.evaluation_criteria: NOT FOUND (this is a market survey/preliminary consultation, not the formal tender evaluation phase)

tenders.english_summary: The Institute for Clinical and Experimental Medicine in Czechia is procuring modular (standardized) office, kitchen, and medical furniture including delivery, handling, assembly, cleaning, and packaging disposal. In exceptional cases, custom-made furniture may be required according to specific buyer requirements.
tenders.what_they_want: Modular (standardized) office furniture, kitchen furniture, and medical furniture. Custom-made (atypical) furniture may be required in exceptional cases. Services include delivery to destination, handling, assembly, cleaning, and packaging material disposal.

tenders.original_title: Czechia – Disposable non-chemical medical consumables and haematological consumables
tenders.buyer_name: Ústav hematologie a krevní transfuze Praha
tenders.english_summary: This is a tender for the supply of disposable non-chemical medical consumables and haematological consumables by the Institute of Haematology and Blood Transfusion in Prague. The procurement covers two categories: universal medical consumables (gloves, syringes, surgical sets, masks, etc.) and technology-specific consumables compatible with the institute's existing medical equipment (special sets, connectors, tubes, filters, etc.).
tenders.what_they_want: Universal medical consumables including disposable items (shoe covers, caps, surgical gowns, surgical sets and masks, pads, razors, gloves, suturing materials, tubes, sets, bags, masks, non-woven textile materials, filters, instruments, syringes, needles) and incontinence aids. Technology-bound medical consumables compatible with the institute's equipment including special sets, connectors, tubes, bags, attachments, and filtration units.

tenders.english_summary: This is a tender from the General Hospital of Serres, Greece, for the procurement of various medical equipment divided into 18 sub-projects. The equipment includes imaging devices (CT scanner, X-ray, ultrasound), dialysis machines and chairs, laboratory analyzers, surgical equipment, ICU beds, and anesthesia machines.
tenders.what_they_want: Sub-project 1: CT scanner (1 unit); Sub-project 2: Digital X-ray system (1 unit); Sub-project 3: Spectrometry analyzer (1 unit); Sub-project 4: Hemodialysis machines (11 units); Sub-project 5: Dialysis chairs with scales (18 units); Sub-project 6: Radiology ultrasound (1 unit); Sub-project 7: Cardiology ultrasound (1 unit); Sub-project 8: EEG machine for Neurology (1 unit); Sub-project 9: Transcranial Doppler ultrasound (1 unit); Sub-project 10: Refraction unit for Ophthalmology (1 unit); Sub-project 11: Sterile welding machine (1 unit); Sub-project 12: Slide staining device (1 unit); Sub-project 13: Portable C-ARM fluoroscopy system (1 unit); Sub-project 14: Surgical instrument washers (3 units); Sub-project 15: Laparoscopic tower (1 unit); Sub-project 16: Physiology monitoring system (1 unit); Sub-project 17: Coronary care unit beds (7 units); Sub-project 18: Anesthesia machines (2 units)

tenders.english_summary: This is a tender for the procurement of protective gowns for the Cologne City Hospitals (Kliniken der Stadt Köln gGmbH) in Germany.
tenders.what_they_want: Protective gowns (Schutzkittel) for hospital use

tenders.english_summary: This is a tender for the supply of electrode gels and sprays used in cardiac diagnostic and treatment procedures at a hospital in Prague, Czech Republic. The procurement covers electrode gels for ECG (electrocardiogram), electrode gels for defibrillation, and electrode sprays for ECG.
tenders.what_they_want: Electrode gels for ECG (electrocardiogram), electrode gels for defibrillation, and electrode sprays for ECG

tenders.english_summary: This is a tender issued by Szpital Wolski Sp. z o.o. (a hospital in Poland) for the procurement of surgical gloves. The detailed specifications are referenced in Attachment No. 2 to the tender documentation (SWZ).
tenders.what_they_want: Surgical gloves (specific quantities, sizes, and technical specifications are referenced in Attachment No. 2 to SWZ which is not included in this notice)

tenders.original_title: Czechia – Real-time Polymerase Chain Reaction (PCR) equipment
tenders.english_summary: Faculty Hospital Motol in Czech Republic is procuring multiple research equipment items for pediatric clinic and medical microbiology institute purposes under research grant IG 6001. The procurement includes a washer for LIPS system, oscillation device, deep freezer, fundus camera with AI, and real-time PCR equipment, all including installation.
tenders.what_they_want: 1) Washer for LIPS (Luciferase Immunoprecipitation System) for research purposes; 2) Oscillation device for research purposes; 3) Deep freezer box -86°C for research purposes; 4) Fundus camera with AI for diabetic retinopathy evaluation for research purposes; 5) Real-time PCR equipment for research purposes. All equipment to include installation at either the Pediatric Clinic 2nd Medical Faculty UK and Faculty Hospital Motol or the Institute of Medical Microbiology 2nd Medical Faculty UK and Faculty Hospital Motol.

tenders.buyer_name: AZIENDA OSPEDALIERA UNIVERSITARIA POLICLINICO "P. GIACCONE" APPALTI E FORNITURE/AREA PROVVEDITORATO - PALERMO
tenders.english_summary: This tender is for the procurement of sterilization equipment and related consumables by a university hospital in Palermo, Italy. Specifically, they are seeking 3 sterilizers and 2 instrument washers along with dedicated consumable materials.
tenders.what_they_want: 3 sterilizers (sterilizzatrici), 2 instrument washers (lavaferri), and dedicated consumable materials for these devices

tenders.buyer_name: Narodowy Instytut Onkologii im. Marii Skłodowskiej-Curie - Państwowy Instytut Badawczy Oddział w Krakowie
tenders.english_summary: This is a tender for the supply of nuclear medicine imaging equipment (PET/CT and SPECT scanners) along with necessary room adaptations for the Maria Skłodowska-Curie National Research Institute of Oncology in Krakow, Poland. The procurement includes both the medical devices and associated construction/adaptation work.
tenders.what_they_want: PET/CT scanner with necessary room adaptations, and SPECT scanner with necessary room adaptations. Detailed specifications are provided in attachments 1, 1a, 1b, 1c, 3, 3A, 6a, and 6b of the tender documentation.

tenders.buyer_name: Szpital Uniwersytecki im. K.Marcinkowskiego w Zielonej Górze sp. z o.o.
tenders.english_summary: This is a multi-part tender for successive deliveries of various cardiovascular and interventional cardiology medical devices to a university hospital in Zielona Góra, Poland. The procurement covers diagnostic catheters for coronary angiography, stents, thrombectomy sets, embolization coils, balloon catheters, guidewires, brain protection systems, vessel closure systems, and related consumables.
tenders.what_they_want: Diagnostic catheters for difficult anatomy coronary angiography; low-profile thin-walled stents with biodegradable polymer; pulmonary thrombectomy sets; embolization coils with guidewires and balloon catheters; guidewires, stents, atherectomy catheters and coils with medical device lease; brain protection systems, stents, balloon catheters, guidewires and vessel closure systems; balloon catheters and self-expanding stents for femoral and popliteal arteries coated with ePTFE; nitinol supports, hydrophilic guidewires, balloon catheters, stents; supplies for Mark7 Arterion contrast injector and angiography syringes; sterile drapes and disposable equipment sets.

tenders.english_summary: This is a tender from Klinički bolnički centar Osijek (Clinical Hospital Center Osijek) in Croatia for the procurement of medical consumables. The notice repeatedly lists "Potrošni medicinski materijal" (medical consumable materials) but does not provide specific details about the types, quantities, or specifications of the consumables required.
tenders.what_they_want: Medical consumable materials (Potrošni medicinski materijal). No specific items, model numbers, brands, quantities, or detailed specifications are mentioned in the available description.

tenders.english_summary: This is a procurement tender for various electrosurgical generators and related surgical equipment for general surgery, minor surgery, vascular sealing, bipolar resection, argon plasma coagulation, ultrasonic dissection, radiofrequency ablation, orthopedic revision surgery, and surgical smoke evacuators.
tenders.what_they_want: Electrosurgical generator for general surgery, electrosurgical generator for minor surgery, thermofusion generator for vascular sealing, bipolar resection generator, argon plasma coagulation generator, ultrasonic dissection generator, ultrasound generator, radiofrequency ablation generator, radiofrequency electrosurgery generator, orthopedic revision surgery generator, electric scalpel (monopolar alternative without return plate), dual-operator all-energy electrosurgical generator, surgical smoke evacuator.

tenders.original_title: Poland – Disposable non-chemical medical consumables and haematological consumables
tenders.english_summary: This tender is for successive deliveries of disposable medical equipment and small medical supplies to a pediatric hospital in Bielsko-Biała, Poland. The detailed description of the procurement subject and list of assortment is contained in Annex No. 2 to the procurement specifications (SWZ).
tenders.what_they_want: Disposable medical equipment and small medical supplies (specific items detailed in Annex No. 2 to procurement documentation). No specific model numbers or brands mentioned in the notice.

tenders.original_title: Poland – Disposable non-chemical medical consumables and haematological consumables
tenders.english_summary: This tender is for successive deliveries of disposable gloves and personal protective equipment (PPE) to a pediatric hospital in Bielsko-Biała, Poland. The detailed specifications are provided in Annex 2 of the procurement documentation.
tenders.what_they_want: Disposable gloves (single-use) and personal protective equipment (PPE) for successive/ongoing deliveries. Specific details are referenced in Annex 2 of the tender documentation.

tenders.original_title: Poland – Disposable non-chemical medical consumables and haematological consumables
tenders.english_summary: This is a tender for successive deliveries of disposable medical equipment and small medical devices to a pediatric hospital in Bielsko-Biała, Poland. The detailed description of the subject matter and assortment list is contained in Annex 2 to the procurement specifications.
tenders.what_they_want: Disposable medical equipment and small medical devices (specific items, models, and brands are referenced in Annex 2 to the procurement specifications which is not included in this notice)

tenders.english_summary: KB Dubrava hospital in Croatia is procuring various medical consumables for neurological diagnostics including materials for invasive monitoring, EMG, EEG, TMS examinations, polysomnography, evoked potentials recording, non-invasive ventilation, SEEG electrodes, botulinum toxin application (compatible with Dantec Clavis device), pulse generator consumables, acoustic headphones, and ultrasound gels.
tenders.what_they_want: Medical consumables for invasive monitoring; EMG examination materials; EEG examination materials (including recording caps and accessories); TMS examination materials; polysomnography consumables; evoked potentials recording materials (pastes, gels, detergents); non-invasive ventilation supplies; SEEG electrodes and accessories; application materials for EEG and transcutaneous electrical stimulation; botulinum toxin application materials compatible with Dantec Clavis device; pulse generator consumables; polysomnography laboratory consumables; acoustically shielded headphones; ultrasound gels.

tenders.english_summary: This is a procurement tender for consumable materials and accessories for cardiac monitoring equipment and defibrillators from multiple manufacturers. The Clinical Hospital Center Split in Croatia is seeking supplies compatible with various ECG devices, Holter monitors, defibrillators, and telemetry systems already in use at their facility.
tenders.what_they_want: Consumable materials and accessories for defibrillators and cardiac monitoring devices from multiple manufacturers including: NIHON KHODEN (models TEC-5521, TEC-5531, 5621K, TEC-5631K), Zoll (AED PRO, AED+, E-series, M-series, R-series, X-series), Mindray BeneHeart (D3, R12, R3), Mortara Holter H3+, Bionet CardioTouch 3000, Microport SpiderView, SCHILLER medilogAR, Lifepak 20 and 15, MORTARA EKG devices (ELI 280, 350, 380, 250, 250C), ATRIA 6100, Burdick 8500, Cardiorapid (K 130D, K3600 LCD), CONTEC CMS 300G, EDAN (SE-601B, SE-1200 Express, SE-601, SE-1201), Welch Allyn CP150, Philips Pagewriter TC30, GE Medical Systems (MAC 800, 1200 ST, 2000), Aspel HLT-712, Philips Efficia DFM 100 and Heartstart XL, BTL CardioPoint H600, NorthEast Monitoring (DR180+, DR181+, DR200, DR300), Lumed EuroHolter, Reanibex 800, COMEN (S8, S5, H12, CM1200, CM1200A), SCHILLER AT and CARDIOVIT series, SCHILLER Defigard HD-7, EKG electrodes, and telemetry monitor TM80 materials.

tenders.english_summary: This is a tender issued by the Clinical Hospital Center Zagreb in Croatia for the procurement of implantable materials for vascular surgery. The notice relates to vascular prostheses and associated surgical implant materials.
tenders.what_they_want: Implantable materials for vascular surgery (ugradbeni materijal za vaskularnu kirurgiju), specifically vascular prostheses and related surgical implants.

tenders.english_summary: Region Västerbotten needs to replace a SPECT/CT camera at Nuclear Medicine, Imaging and Functional Medicine department at Norrland University Hospital in Umeå. The system must be capable of producing both planar images and SPECT/CT, equipped with collimators for low, medium and high energy photons, with CT producing full diagnostic quality images.
tenders.what_they_want: SPECT/CT camera system capable of producing planar images and SPECT/CT imaging, equipped with collimators for measuring low, medium and high energy photons, with CT component capable of producing full diagnostic quality images. Used for examinations of heart, kidneys, adrenal glands, skeleton, thyroid, parathyroid glands, lymphatic system, rare tumor investigations and dosimetry.

tenders.english_summary: This is a tender for a comprehensive range of neurosurgical consumables and medical devices by KB Dubrava hospital in Croatia. The procurement includes cerebrospinal fluid drainage systems, surgical adhesives, spinal stabilization systems, neurostimulators, bipolar forceps, microscope drapes, and various other neurosurgical consumables and implants.
tenders.what_they_want: Cerebrospinal fluid drainage systems; collagen-based dura mater replacements; scalp clip applicators; synthetic resorbable gel for dura adhesion in craniotomies; consumables for cavitational ultrasonic devices; synthetic resorbable gel for spinal operations; neurosurgical patches; skin adhesives; fibrin glue application systems with air spray; drainage materials (drains and bottles); bipolar coagulation forceps; microscalpel blades and handles; surgical markers with measuring tape; device covers; cotton and synthetic swabs; pulse generators and consumables; cervical artificial discs; evoked potential consumables; epidural spinal electrodes; disc, bar, and connection adapter electrodes; flexible meters; monopolar and bipolar electrodes with cables for neural tissue stimulation; abrasive skin preparation gel; electrolytic gel; conductive contact cream; laminoplasty plate and screw sets; expandable inserts for thoracolumbar corpectomy; ICP, PAO2 and temperature measurement catheters; craniotomy consumables; valves; surgical adhesives; posterior stabilization systems for thoracolumbar spine (open and percutaneous approach); occipital-cervical spine stabilization systems; Midas Rex and Midas Legend craniotome consumables; thoraco-lumbar spine stabilization systems; deep brain stimulation neurostimulators; spinal cord stimulation neurostimulators; implantable programmable pumps; 3D printed molds; topical adhesive and two-component skin closure systems; microscope drapes; thoracolumbar and sacral spine procedure systems; special implants for spinal procedures, vertebroplasty and cranioplasty; emergency spinal osteosynthesis implants with instrumentation; osteosynthetic materials for neurosurgery; bipolar coagulation forceps; micro scalpel blades and handles; plates and consumables for anterior cervical fixation; consumables for dorsal thoracolumbar stabilization; consumables for tumor neurosurgical procedures and cranioplasty; cranial perforators; skull bone fixation consumables; consumables for cavitational ultrasonic aspirator for soft and bone tissue; intervertebral fusion inserts; X-ray and endoscope covers.

tenders.english_summary: This is a procurement for operating theatre instruments in Belgium, specifically for electrosurgical generators and single-use handpieces with and without smoke aspiration cannulas.
tenders.what_they_want: Electrosurgical generators (générateurs pour électrochirurgie), single-use handpieces without aspiration cannula (pièces à main à usage unique sans canule d'aspiration), and single-use handpieces with smoke aspiration cannulas (pièces à main à usage unique avec canule d'aspiration de fumées).

tenders.buyer_name: Narodowy Instytut Onkologii im. Marii Skłodowskiej-Curie - Państwowy Instytut Badawczy Oddział w Krakowie
tenders.english_summary: The National Institute of Oncology in Krakow, Poland is procuring medical imaging equipment consisting of a PET/CT scanner and a SPECT scanner, both including necessary room adaptation works. This is a two-part procurement for nuclear medicine imaging devices with associated facility modifications.
tenders.what_they_want: PET/CT scanner with necessary room adaptation works, and SPECT scanner with necessary room adaptation works. Both devices require facility modifications as detailed in procurement attachments.

tenders.buyer_name: 4. Wojskowy Szpital Kliniczny z Polikliniką Samodzielny Publiczny Zakład Opieki Zdrowotnej we Wrocławiu
tenders.english_summary: This is a procurement for the delivery of angiography devices along with room adaptation as part of Poland's National Recovery and Resilience Plan. The project involves replacing angiography equipment in four different locations: a hybrid operating room in the Cardiac Surgery Department, the Hemodynamics Laboratory, the Electrophysiology Laboratory, and purchasing a new angiograph for an additional Hemodynamics Laboratory, all including necessary room modifications and adaptations.
tenders.what_they_want: Angiography devices (aparatura rentgenowska, urządzenia do angiografii, cyfrowe urządzenia do angiografii) for four locations: (1) Hybrid operating room in Cardiac Surgery Department with room modernization, (2) Hemodynamics Laboratory with adaptation works, (3) Electrophysiology Laboratory with room adaptation, and (4) new angiograph for Hemodynamics Laboratory with room adaptation. Associated construction, engineering, architectural services, finishing works, electrical installations, plumbing, insulation, furniture, and medical gases are included.

tenders.english_summary: This is a tender for medical consumables for neurological and sleep diagnostic procedures at KB Dubrava hospital in Croatia. The procurement covers supplies for invasive monitoring, EMG, EEG, TMS examinations, polysomnography, and related diagnostic procedures including electrodes, gels, pastes, caps, and accessories.
tenders.what_they_want: Medical consumables for invasive monitoring, EMG examination, EEG examination, TMS examination, and polysomnography; EEG recording caps and accessories; EMG and EEG examination consumables; evoked potentials recording materials (pastes, gels, detergents); non-invasive ventilation consumables; SEEG electrodes and accessories; application materials for EEG and transcutaneous electrical stimulation; consumables for botulinum toxin application compatible with Dantec Clavis device; pulse generator consumables; polysomnography laboratory consumables; acoustically shielded headphones; ultrasound gels.

tenders.original_title: Poland – Miscellaneous medical devices and products
tenders.english_summary: This tender is for the procurement and installation of medical equipment to convert four ERJ190-200 aircraft into air medical evacuation platforms, including 6 intensive care stations and 16 non-intensive care bed stations across 5 different configurations. The contract includes delivery of equipment, transfer of ownership, preparation of certification documentation, and obtaining Supplemental Type Certificate (STC) approval for the aircraft modifications.
tenders.what_they_want: Medical equipment and additional equipment for air medical evacuation on ERJ190-200 aircraft (serial numbers: 19000415, 19000444, 19000462, 19000516); equipment for 6 intensive care stations and 16 non-intensive care bed stations in 5 different configurations; complete certification documentation and Supplemental Type Certificate (STC) for aircraft modifications.

tenders.original_title: Czechia – Miscellaneous medical devices and products
tenders.english_summary: This is a procurement for surgical instruments to be used in an "Introduction to Surgery" course (KA 1) in Brno, Czech Republic. A total of 15 courses are planned during the period 2026-2028.
tenders.what_they_want: Surgical instruments (instrumentária) for Introduction to Surgery courses, with specific items listed in Annex 1 of the tender documentation (not provided in this excerpt).

tenders.english_summary: This tender is for continuous supply of consumable materials for coagulation measurement at the General University Hospital in Prague. The selected supplier must also provide 4 microcoagulation devices on free loan with free servicing and maintenance for the contract duration.
tenders.what_they_want: Consumable materials for coagulation measurement (test tubes and related supplies); 4 units of microcoagulation devices to be provided on loan with free servicing and maintenance

tenders.english_summary: This is a multi-part procurement by the Czech Ministry of Defense for various medical equipment and devices. The tender consists of 10 separate lots covering items ranging from portable steam sterilizers to CPR training mannequins, with quantities varying from 2 to 100 units depending on the equipment type.
tenders.what_they_want: Part 3: 14 portable steam sterilizers; Part 4: 10 active transport thermoboxes for blood; Part 10: 2 portable X-ray devices; Part 1: 11 mobile hand washing units; Part 8: 100 automatic external defibrillators (AED); Part 2: 20 hot air patient warming devices; Part 5: 6 active transport thermoboxes for blood plasma; Part 9: 5 electrosurgical generators; Part 6: 2 lung ventilators for long-term ventilation; Part 7: 2 full-body CPR training mannequins

tenders.buyer_name: Samodzielny Publiczny ZOZ Wojewódzki Szpital Zespolony im. Jędrzeja Śniadeckiego w Białymstoku
tenders.english_summary: This tender is for the purchase, delivery, installation and commissioning of a stationary X-ray device with fluoroscopy function at a provincial hospital in Białystok, Poland. The procurement includes room adaptation, necessary software, transport, installation, and training of medical and technical personnel.
tenders.what_they_want: Stationary X-ray apparatus with fluoroscopy function, including necessary software for operation, room adaptation work, transport and installation services, and training for medical and technical staff.

tenders.english_summary: This tender is for the supply, installation, and commissioning of two mobile and flight-capable infant transport incubator systems for a children's and youth hospital in Salzburg, Austria. The systems must comply with DIN EN 1789 (European ambulance standards) and EASA FORM 1 (helicopter use certification), and include ventilators, monitoring equipment mounts, infusion pumps, and suction devices, with optional accessories and service contracts.
tenders.what_they_want: Two mobile and flight-capable infant transport incubator systems compliant with DIN EN 1789 and EASA FORM 1 standards, including transport ventilators, mounting brackets for Philips IntelliVue X3 monitor system with necessary cabling, infusion pumps, suction devices, optional accessories, and optional service contracts for maintenance, repair, and software updates.

tenders.original_title: Czechia – Miscellaneous medical devices and products
tenders.english_summary: This is a tender for the supply of 2 glass UV boxes for PCR (Polymerase Chain Reaction) testing at the General University Hospital in Prague, Czech Republic.
tenders.what_they_want: 2 pieces of glass UV boxes for PCR

tenders.english_summary: This is a market research notice from a hospital operator in Austria for a fully automated mass spectrometer for therapeutic drug monitoring purposes. This appears to be a preliminary market exploration rather than a full tender procurement.
tenders.what_they_want: A fully automated mass spectrometer system for performing therapeutic drug monitoring (TDM) workload

tenders.original_title: Belgium – Seats, chairs and related products, and associated parts
tenders.english_summary: This is a procurement tender by CHU HELORA hospital in Belgium for patient transfer equipment and mobility aids. The tender covers various types of transfer chairs, boards, stretchers (hydraulic and electric), sliding sheets, and disposable stretcher linens.
tenders.what_they_want: Transfer chairs (chaises de transfert), transfer boards (planches de transfert), hydraulic stretchers (brancards hydrauliques), electric stretchers (brancards électriques), sliding sheets (draps de glisse), and disposable stretcher sheets (draps de brancard jetables).

tenders.english_summary: This is a procurement by the Swedish Total Defence Recruitment and Assessment Agency for the supply of medical equipment across multiple sub-areas as detailed in the procurement documents.
tenders.what_they_want: Medical equipment across multiple sub-areas (specific devices and equipment categories to be detailed in procurement documents)

tenders.english_summary: This is a framework agreement procurement for customized surgical sets for operating departments within Region Stockholm and Region Gotland. tenders.what_they_want: Customized surgical sets for 19 medical specialties: (1) Ear & Jaw, (2) Orthopedics & Hand, (3) Neurosurgery & Pediatric Neurosurgery, (4) Vascular, (5) Thorax, (6) Laparoscopy, (7) ERCP, (8) General Surgery, (9) Breast sets, (10) Plastic surgery, (11) Gynecology, (12) Urology, (13) Pediatric ECMO, (14) Robotic surgery, (15) Transplantation, (16) Pacemaker/Subcutaneous venous port, (17) Dental sets, (18) Ophthalmic sets, (19) Other sets.

tenders.what_they_want: Two digital mobile X-ray systems (radiography systems) with telescopic tube arms specifically designed for mobile use in intensive care units

tenders.english_summary: This tender is for the purchase of 2 mobile X-ray devices for the medical imaging department at Jan Yperman Hospital in Belgium. The contract includes delivery, installation, maintenance, IT integration (DICOM, PACS, dose registration system), and Dutch-language training for medical, nursing, technical staff and physicians.
tenders.what_they_want: 2 mobile X-ray (RX) devices for bedside radiography of thorax, pelvis, hips, shoulders, abdomen and other body parts. Includes required IT connections (DICOM, PACS, dose registration system) and Dutch-language training for staff.

tenders.original_title: Slovenia – Medical equipments, pharmaceuticals and personal care products
tenders.english_summary: This is a public procurement tender by a senior citizens' home in Metlika, Slovenia for successive delivery of sanitary/medical materials for the period from February 2026 to November 2027. This is a repeat tender for lots that were not awarded previously, divided into two lots.
tenders.what_they_want: Sanitary materials (sanitetni material) for successive delivery over approximately 21 months (February 2026 to November 2027), divided into two lots. Specific items, model numbers, or brands are not specified in this notice.

tenders.original_title: Czechia – Miscellaneous medical devices and products
tenders.english_summary: This is a tender for the supply of surgical instruments for advanced trauma surgery courses in Brno, Czech Republic. The procurement covers two parts: instruments for limbs and pelvis courses (11 courses planned) and instruments for external fixation courses (4 courses on dry bones planned).
tenders.what_they_want: Surgical instruments (instrumentarium) for advanced trauma surgery courses, specifically: Part 3A_2 - Limbs and pelvis instruments, and Part 3A_2 - External fixation instruments. Detailed instrument lists are provided in Annex 1 of the tender documentation.

tenders.buyer_name: Beskidzkie Centrum Onkologii- Szpital Miejski im. Jana Pawła II w Bielsku-Białej.
tenders.english_summary: The Beskidzkie Oncology Center - Municipal Hospital named after John Paul II in Bielska-Biała, Poland is procuring specialized surgical instruments for surgical operations. The scope includes both single-use and reusable specialized equipment, with detailed specifications provided in Attachment 5 to the procurement documentation.
tenders.what_they_want: Specialized surgical instruments for surgical operations, including both single-use (disposable) and reusable equipment. Detailed product list is referenced in Attachment 5 (price-assortment form).

tenders.original_title: Germany – Imaging equipment for medical, dental and veterinary use
tenders.english_summary: The Medizinische Hochschule Hannover (MHH) is procuring a combined small animal PET/MR system and SPECT/PET/CT system to replace existing 2011-era equipment in their preclinical molecular imaging center at the Department of Nuclear Medicine. Both systems must be from the same manufacturer to ensure compatibility, workflow efficiency, and animal welfare considerations during procedures.
tenders.what_they_want: Combined small animal PET/MR imaging system and SPECT/PET/CT imaging system for preclinical research, including installation, commissioning, training, and option for long-term maintenance agreement. Both systems must be from the same manufacturer and fully compatible with each other.

tenders.original_title: Czechia – Miscellaneous medical devices and products

The procurement covers two parts: instruments for limbs and pelvis courses (11 courses planned) and instruments for external fixation courses (4 courses on dry bones planned), all to be held in Brno.
tenders.what_they_want: Surgical instruments for advanced trauma surgery courses: Part 3A_2 - Limbs and pelvis instruments (for 11 courses) and Part 3A_2 - External fixation instruments (for 4 dry bone courses). Specific instrument lists are detailed in Annex 1 of the tender documentation.

tenders.english_summary: The University Hospital Frankfurt is procuring two digital mobile X-ray systems with telescopic tube arms for mobile use in intensive care units.
tenders.what_they_want: Two digital mobile X-ray systems (radiography systems) with telescopic tube arms designed for mobile deployment in intensive care units

This is not an actual procurement but rather an ongoing market analysis where suppliers are invited to provide information about themselves and possible solutions ahead of a future tender.
tenders.what_they_want: Repetitive Transcranial Magnetic Stimulation (rTMS) equipment

tenders.original_title: Austria – Laboratory, optical and precision equipments (excl. glasses)
tenders.english_summary: This is a procurement for the supply, installation, and commissioning of general laboratory equipment including autoclaves, ice machines, and drying cabinets, as well as systems for processing, distillation, and sterilization, particularly water treatment systems, for the Vienna University Hospital AKH Wien.
tenders.what_they_want: General laboratory equipment including autoclaves, ice machines (Eismaschinen), drying cabinets (Trockenschränke), and processing/preparation systems including water treatment systems (Wasseraufbereitungsanlagen), distillation equipment, and sterilization systems. Services include delivery, assembly/installation (Montage), and commissioning (Inbetriebnahme).

tenders.english_summary: This is a tender from a Polish specialized hospital for the procurement of various injectable solutions and intravenous infusion fluids. The procurement includes water for injection, glucose solutions at various concentrations (5%, 10%, 20%), sodium chloride solutions (0.9%), electrolyte solutions, Ringer's solution, and combination solutions in different volumes ranging from 100ml to 1000ml in plastic bottles or bags with two ports.
tenders.what_they_want: Injectable solutions including: Aqua pro injection (250ml, 500ml, 1000ml), Glucose 5% (100ml, 250ml, 500ml), Glucose 10% (250ml, 500ml), Glucose 20% (500ml), Sodium Chloride 0.9% (100ml, 250ml, 500ml, 1000ml in plastic bottles and bags, 500ml in glass bottles), pediatric electrolyte solutions with 148 mval/l cations/anions and 10g/l glucose (100ml x 40 vials, 250ml x 20 vials), Ringer's solution (250ml), multi-electrolyte isotonic physiological fluids containing Na, Cl, Ca, K, Mg ions without lactates (250ml, 500ml, 1000ml), Glucose 5% and Sodium Chloride 0.9% combination 2:1 (250ml, 500ml), Mannitol 15-20% (100ml). All in plastic bottles or bags with two ports, except one item in glass bottles. For glass packaging, holders for mounting on infusion stands are required.

tenders.english_summary: This is a tender from Opća bolnica "Dr. Anđelko Višić" Bjelovar hospital in Croatia for the procurement of medical consumables. The tender is divided into 31 different groups/lots of medical consumable items.
tenders.what_they_want: Medical consumables divided into multiple groups (Grupa 1 through Grupa 24, plus additional subgroups 4a, 4b, 5a, 5b, 8a, 10a, and 22a). Specific items within each group are not detailed in the notice.

tenders.english_summary: This tender is for the supply, installation, and commissioning of surgical motors for Cliniques de l'Europe hospitals in Belgium. The procurement focuses on operating theatre equipment for surgical procedures.
